notes: Gate 4 policy-output mirror admission slice completed for the packed-i4 source-backed same-target selected-dispatch/target boundary. The provider route metadata, target support-bundle mapping, and target artifact validation now carry selected_dispatch_preference as an explicit provider-owned policy-output mirror in addition to the existing low-precision dispatch_preference mirror. Target validation rejects metadata-only selected_dispatch_preference mirrors when hasSelectedDispatchPolicyOutput is false and rejects stale performance-preferred promotion while accepted dequant source-backed evidence remains correctness-fallback/not-performance-preferred. Focused C++ and lit coverage preserve accepted no-win behavior and stale mirror rejection. Gate 3 remains complete. Macro task remains active for remaining Gate 4 campaign-level measured-win/no-win dispatch admission audit; no performance-preferred dispatch is admitted without fresh measured-win evidence plus synchronized provider and target admission facts.
